hero.title: Perspective changes everything.
hero.subtitle: The world moves fast, but we look further. Arasue Horizon is the strategic matrix connecting global markets, capital, and industries with a clear, long-range vision. We don't just manage the present; we blueprint tomorrow.

vision.title: Driving Innovation Across Industries
vision.p1: At Arasue Horizon, we believe in the power of diversified excellence. By incubating and scaling specialized subsidiaries, we create a robust ecosystem where technology, studios, and consumer goods converge.
vision.p2: Our central holding provides strategic direction, capital allocation, and shared resources, allowing our divisions to focus purely on disrupting their respective markets.

forge.name: Arasue Forge
forge.description: Great ideas mean nothing if they stay in the air. Arasue Forge is the development studio where advanced software and critical tech come to life with precision, power, and flawless performance. We build the digital infrastructure that defines industries.

labs.name: Arasue Labs
labs.description: True excellence accepts no shortcuts. Arasue Labs bridges scientific rigor with nature's purity, managing the import and logistics of premium products with absolute traceability. Unwavering quality, from the source to your hands.

studios.name: Arasue Studios
studios.description: In a sea of constant noise, we create depth. Arasue Studios produces, publishes, and distributes high-fidelity content that captures attention and leaves a real mark. Powerful storytelling backed by sophisticated execution.

protection.name: Arasue Protection
protection.description: Real success is never left to chance. Arasue Protection shields your life, health, and wealth with high-tier insurance solutions and absolute certainty. We protect your legacy so you can focus on building it.

global.title: Global Presence
global.desc: Operating seamlessly across North America and the world.

testimonials.text1: Arasue Forge transformed our entire digital infrastructure. Their architecture allowed us to scale from 10k to 500k monthly active users without a single hiccup.
testimonials.text2: The sheer speed and quality of their React development is unmatched. They don't just build apps, they build products that people love to use.

questions.q: Do you work with existing legacy codebases?
questions.a: Our specialty is building and modernizing high-performance systems. We assess existing architectures, but we frequently recommend migrations to Next.js and Cloud-native ecosystems to guarantee scalability.

questions.q: How does the Web SaaS model work?
questions.a: Instead of charging massive upfront fees, our SaaS ecosystem requires an accessible Setup cost and a monthly membership that covers premium hosting, ongoing maintenance, analytics, and direct support.

questions.q: What technologies do you use in Forge?
questions.a: We deploy applications using React (Next.js), Node.js, Serverless Databases (PostgreSQL/MongoDB), and global edge infrastructure, along with orchestrators like n8n for AI Agents.

questions.q: How long does an engineering sprint take?
questions.a: Precision engineering requires rigor. For agile iterations and MVPs, we average 8 to 10 weeks. Complex enterprise ecosystems are planned in phases of 3 to 6 months.

questions.q: How does the regional USD/MXN pricing work?
questions.a: We algorithmically adjust our prices to deliver the exact same elite-level engineering to corporations in the US (USD) and scaling companies in Mexico (MXN), without exchange-rate friction.

modal.title: Strictly Limited Allocation.
modal.subtitle: Our raw desert honey is harvested in micro-batches to protect the bees and preserve peak enzymatic quality. Once it's gone, we wait until next season.

hero.title: The Purest Liquid Gold from the Desert.
hero.subtitle: 100% Raw. Unfiltered. Single-origin. Experience the untamed sweetness and healing properties of wild desert flora.

press.tag: Loved by chefs and foodies nationwide

origin.title: Stop Eating Dead Honey.
origin.subtitle: Most honey on grocery shelves has been stripped of the properties that make it a superfood. Heating and filtering leave you with nothing but glorified sugar syrup. Arasue Honey is different.
origin.use1_desc: Processed at hive temperature to protect live nutrients and vital enzymes.
origin.use2_desc: Rich in beneficial pollen and antioxidants, maintaining its natural thick texture.
origin.use3_desc: Directly sourced from the Sonoran Desert. You taste exactly what the hive created.

map.map_desc: Our extraction nodes are situated deep within the untouched reserves of the Sonoran Desert. Far from commercial agriculture and pesticides.
map.title: Born in the Harshest Environment.
map.subtitle: The Sonoran Desert is unforgiving. Only the most resilient flora survive here, yielding a complex, unadulterated sweetness.
map.type1_desc: Earthy, smoky, and deeply rich. Foraged from the resilient Mesquite trees that anchor the desert ecosystem.
map.type2_desc: A complex blend of Palo Verde, Ironwood, and wild desert wildflowers. Buttery texture with bright floral notes.

comparison.title: Stop Eating Dead Honey.
comparison.subtitle1: Most honey on grocery shelves has been stripped of the very properties that make it a superfood. Heating and filtering leave you with nothing but glorified sugar syrup.
comparison.subtitle2: Arasue Honey is different. We respect the bees and the ancient desert. You taste exactly what the hive created: thick, complex, and alive.
comparison.good_2: Unfiltered: rich in pollen and antioxidants
comparison.good_3: Single-Origin: direct from the Sonoran Desert

origin.title: Born in the Harshest Environment. Yielding the Sweetest Reward.
origin.subtitle: The Sonoran Desert is unforgiving. Only the most resilient flora survive here—Mesquite, Palo Verde, and Ironwood. Our bees forage these rare blooms, creating a honey with a flavor profile unlike anything you've ever experienced. Earthy, buttery, and profoundly rich.
origin.use1_desc: Drizzle over aged cheddar or blue cheese.
origin.use2_desc: Stir into Earl Grey or pour over Greek yogurt.
origin.use3_desc: Savor it raw for a daily immunity boost.

ritual.title: Transform Your Coffee Into a Ritual.
ritual.subtitle: Forget bitter processed sugars. A single, velvety spoonful of Arasue Raw Honey adds complex, buttery notes to your brew, balancing the roast with unadulterated desert sweetness.

shop.title: Secure Your Harvest
shop.subtitle: Small batch extraction. 100% Purity Guarantee.
shop.promise: The Arasue Promise: If you don't agree this is the best honey you've ever tasted, we'll refund your order. No questions asked.

testimonials.title: Taste the Difference
testimonials.t1_text: "I've tried Manuka and local honeys, but Arasue has this incredible buttery texture and complex flavor. You can literally taste the desert flowers. I subscribe monthly now."
testimonials.t2_text: "Finally, a real raw honey. It crystallized perfectly (which proves it's raw) and the taste is unbelievably rich. Makes my morning coffee ritual 10x better."
testimonials.t3_text: "I bought the 3-pack and gifted one to my mother. It's thick, fragrant, and you can feel the quality. Beautiful packaging and lightning-fast shipping."

faq.title: Questions?
faq.a1: Crystallization is the ultimate proof of pure, raw honey! Commercial honey stays liquid forever because it's boiled and ultra-filtered. To soften your honey, simply place the jar in a bowl of warm water (not boiling) for 15 minutes.
faq.q2: Where exactly does it come from?
faq.a2: Our hives are located deep in the Sonoran Desert in Mexico. The bees forage entirely on wild desert flora like Mesquite and Ironwood, untouched by pesticides or commercial agriculture.
faq.a3: We ship nationwide across the US directly from our Arizona fulfillment center. Orders typically arrive within 3-5 business days. Shipping is completely free when you order 3 or more jars.

footer.desc: Bringing the raw, untouched essence of the Sonoran Desert directly to your table.

josue_profile.title: Josue Daniel Lopez Barreras
josue_profile.role: CEO & Co-Founder, Arasue Horizon | Technical Product Manager
josue_profile.summary: Results-driven Technical Product Manager with 8+ years of experience delivering enterprise SaaS products at the intersection of InsurTech, HealthTech, and AI automation. With a strong focus on operational excellence and complex system architecture, he has engineered high-caliber multi-carrier API integrations and "Zero-Touch" LLM engines to scale businesses globally without compromising regulatory compliance or security.

exp_alex.role: Head of Product & Technical Program Manager
exp_alex.desc: Owned end-to-end product lifecycle for an AI-powered enterprise insurance platform. Consolidated 4 legacy systems, reducing TCO by 75%, and engineered a Zero-Touch LLM automation engine that cut processing times from 40 to under 5 minutes.

exp_tesla.desc: Architected a Multi-Carrier API Gateway integrating Liberty Mutual, SURA, and HDI. Led product expansion across 5+ Latin American markets, automating 85% of insurance operational tasks.

exp_primex.desc: Managed a $5M+ portfolio of IoT-based predictive maintenance systems for critical healthcare equipment across 15,000+ sites, achieving 99.9% uptime and coordinating global hardware/software engineers.

josue_profile.edu_honors: Valedictorian (GPA 3.96/4.0) — Best Graduate, Class of 2018 | State Award for Academic Merit in Engineering
